summary: Tested Admin Console features, SEO endpoints, Request Access page, Work With Us FAQ, and Blog content loading. Most features working correctly. Identified JSON-LD schema rendering issue across Home, Work With Us, and Films pages.

integration_issues.issue: JSON-LD schemas for Organization (Home), FAQPage (Work With Us), and Movie (Films) are not rendering in the DOM despite correct Helmet code. This is due to react-helmet-async not properly handling script children - requires using dangerouslySetInnerHTML approach.

passed: SEO robots.txt endpoint returns correct content with sitemap reference
SEO sitemap.xml endpoint returns dynamic XML with static and dynamic URLs
GET /api/blog returns blog posts (content excluded for optimization)
GET /api/blog/{id} returns full post with content
GET /api/assets returns all assets with collection and folder metadata
FAQ Section exists on Work With Us page
Request Access shows only studio_access_enabled films (CROWE, The Life of Baldrick, Echoes of Silence, Truth)
Released films without studio_access correctly hidden
Asset Library collection filters present (All, Films, Website, Armory, Den)
Blog content loads in editor (2546 chars verified)
failed: Home Page Organization JSON-LD schema not rendering
Work With Us FAQPage JSON-LD schema not rendering
Films Movie JSON-LD schema not rendering

action_items: FIX JSON-LD Schema Rendering: Update Home.jsx, WorkWithUs.jsx, and Films.jsx to use dangerouslySetInnerHTML for JSON-LD script tags. Example: <script type='application/ld+json' dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: JSON.stringify(schema) }} />
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx was importing from 'react-helmet' instead of 'react-helmet-async' - FIXED during testing
All JSON-LD schemas using children in Helmet script tags don't render - need dangerouslySetInnerHTML pattern
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.jsx - Changed import from react-helmet to react-helmet-async
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. JSON-LD schema rendering needs fix using dangerouslySetInnerHTML. Asset Library folder navigation working for all 4 collections. Blog content loading fix verified. Request Access shows only studio_access_enabled films. FAQ accordion with 12 items working on Work With Us page. SEO API endpoints (/api/seo/robots.txt and /api/seo/sitemap.xml) are fully functional.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: react-helmet-async doesn't properly handle script tag children. The content inside <script> tags when using Helmet needs to use dangerouslySetInnerHTML to properly inject JSON content.
reproduction_steps: 1. Navigate to Home page, Work With Us, or Films detail page
